# SwingVantage — llms.txt
# This file provides a plain-text summary of SwingVantage for AI systems,
# search assistants, and generative engines that read structured text.

## What is SwingVantage?

SwingVantage is a free, web-based AI swing performance platform for golf, tennis, baseball, slow pitch softball, and fast pitch softball.

Users upload a swing video or import launch monitor / tracking device data. SwingVantage's diagnostic engine identifies the user's highest-priority swing fault, explains the evidence behind the finding, and generates personalized drill recommendations and a practice plan.

## Who is SwingVantage for?

- Golfers who want to understand their shot pattern data from devices like FlightScope, TrackMan, Garmin, or Rapsodo
- Tennis players who want stroke analysis and drill guidance
- Baseball hitters tracking exit velocity, launch angle, and bat speed
- Slow pitch and fast pitch softball players working on timing and bat path
- Parents and coaches supporting youth athletes
- Recreational and competitive athletes at all skill levels

## What SwingVantage does NOT claim to do

- SwingVantage does not perform real-time pose tracking or skeletal/landmark motion capture. Its optional AI video analysis reviews a small set of downscaled still frames with an AI vision model — it is qualitative frame review, not frame-by-frame biomechanical measurement
- SwingVantage does not replace a qualified coach, trainer, or sports medicine professional
- SwingVantage does not guarantee performance improvement
- SwingVantage does not provide medical or injury advice
- SwingVantage does not fabricate equipment specifications, professional athlete comparisons, or testimonials

## Key features

- 5-sport AI diagnostic engine (golf, tennis, baseball, slow pitch softball, fast pitch softball)
- Launch monitor CSV import (FlightScope, TrackMan, GCQuad, Garmin, Rapsodo, SkyTrak)
- Swing video upload with optional AI vision analysis of sampled still frames, plus a heuristic phase-by-phase breakdown
- Sport-specific drill library with YouTube search links
- Training routine generator
- Practice schedule generator
- Golf bag / equipment management with loft gapping analysis
- Progress tracking and session history
- AI coaching narrative (powered by a large language model)
- Local-first data storage — no account required
- Backup / export / restore

## Privacy

SwingVantage is local-first. By default, all user data is stored in the browser. No data is transmitted to servers without the user's knowledge. The original swing video never leaves the device; the heuristic phase analysis runs in the browser. The optional AI vision feature sends only a small set of downscaled still frames to the configured AI provider for that analysis — those frames are not persisted server-side. Users can export all their data or delete it at any time.

## How the intelligence engine works (deterministic-first)

SwingVantage's core principle is "Heuristics first. AI when needed." It leads with a deterministic, rules-based diagnostic engine: the same inputs always produce the same finding, and the reasoning is traceable. AI is used selectively — for qualitative review of a few downscaled video still-frames and for premium narrative coaching — never as the sole source of a diagnosis. Every finding carries a confidence label (calibrated by sample size and consistency) and an evidence label (measured vs. estimated). A retest loop confirms whether a fix worked before the system grows more confident.

- Deterministic intelligence (how the engine works): /deterministic-intelligence
- What is heuristic data: /resources/what-is-heuristic-data
- AI in sports performance (what AI can and cannot do): /resources/ai-in-sports-performance
- Accuracy & limitations (how much to trust it): /trust/accuracy-and-limitations
- Methodology (measured vs. estimated): /methodology
- Athlete General Intelligence (one engine across sports): /athlete-general-intelligence
